summary: The obsolete representative #64663 is closed and cannot be the live canonical target. The hydrated cluster contains security-sensitive workspace-symlink and exec-approvals refs, so this repaired result routes the exact security-sensitive refs (#29736, #38622, #40230, #62938, #64472, #64473, #73401, #73988, #74002) to central security handling and leaves the remaining already-closed context refs non-mutating. No close, merge, or fix PR action is planned because open actionable work is security-routed and fix/merge are blocked by the job.
